html:
Exclusive to:  

The Cat Tail is an Item from the Reign of Giants DLC. It is dropped by Catcoons and can be used to craft a Cat Cap.

Downloadable Content

Cat Tails are also included in the Hamlet DLC, however, Catcoons are not present. Instead, Cat Tails can be bought at ‘The Sty’ Oddities Emporium for 4 Oincs, making them renewable.


Usage

×4

“I think it's still swishing.”
–Wilson
“I've kept stranger things than this.”
–Willow
“Wiggly cat part!”
–Wolfgang
“It's matted, patchy and putrid.”
–Wendy
“TAIL ACQUIRED”
–WX-78
“A flexible torso appendage.”
–Wickerbottom
“That's the end of that cat's tale.”
–Woodie
“Tale of tails.”
–Maxwell
“Has more uses than the raccoon tails I'm used to.”
–Wagstaff
“It is the tail öf cute meat.”
–Wigfrid
“I always liked pulling Whiskers' tail.”
–Webber
“This would make a stylish hat.”
–Walani
“Chat noodle.”
–Warly
“Thet coon dropped is' tail!”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS KITTY TAIL”
–Wilba
“Poor little Kitty”
–Wormwood
“Heads or tails? I pick tails.”
–Wheeler
“Grab life by the tail.”
–Winona
“Better yours than mine.”
–Wortox
“Mine now, florp!”
–Wurt
“It's a tall tail! Or, I guess more of a bushy one... never mind.”
–Walter
“I did what I had to do.”
–Wanda
The Cat Tail is an Item from the Reign of Giants DLC. It is dropped by Catcoons and can be used to craft a Cat Cap.
Downloadable Content[edit | edit source]
Cat Tails are also included in the Hamlet DLC, however, Catcoons are not present. Instead, Cat Tails can be bought at ‘The Sty’ Oddities Emporium for 4 Oincs, making them renewable.

The '''Cat Tail''' is an [[Item]] from the ''[[Don't Starve: Reign of Giants|Reign of Giants]]'' DLC. It is dropped by [[Catcoon]]s and can be used to craft a [[Cat Cap]].

=={{Pic32|Gift Icon}} Downloadable Content==
Cat Tails are also included in the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC, however, Catcoons are not present. Instead, Cat Tails can be bought at [[Pig Shops|‘The Sty’ Oddities Emporium]] for 4 [[Oinc]]s, making them renewable.
